Package org.key_project.util.java

@NullMarked package org.key_project.util.java
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.key_project.util
     
    org.key_project.util.java.thread
     
  • Class
    Description
    ArrayUtil
    Provides static methods to work with arrays.
    CheckedProcessBuilder
    Process builder that first checks whether a program is installed.
    CollectionUtil
    Provides static methods to work with Collections.
    IFilter<T>
    Utility class to select elements.
    IFilterWithException<T extends @Nullable Object, E extends Throwable>
    Utility class to select elements which also allows that exceptions are thrown during selection phase.
    IntegerUtil
     
    IOUtil
    Provides static methods to work with java IO.
    IOUtil.IFileVisitor
    A visitor which does something with Files.
    IOUtil.LineInformation
    A line information returned from IOUtil.computeLineInformation(File) and IOUtil.computeLineInformation(InputStream).
    MapUtil
    Utility methods for maps.
    NumberUtil
    Provides utility methods to work with numbers.
    StringUtil
    Provides static methods to work with strings.
    SwingUtil
    Utilities for working with Swing.
    WrapUtils
    This class provides a simple routine that performs line wrapping of strings that may contain long lines.
    XMLUtil
    Provides static methods to work with XML.
    XMLUtil.HTMLRendererReplacer
    This XMLUtil.ITagReplacer can be used to render HTML into a plain text.
    XMLUtil.ITagReplacer
    Instances of this interface are used in XMLUtil.replaceTags(String, ITagReplacer) to replace an individual found tag.
